title: Weather Forecast
text:
## Weather Forecast

Good evening. Tomorrow expect {adjective} skies over the {adjective} valley with {adjective} winds from the {place}.

**Commuters:** Carry a {clothing item} and avoid {adjective} puddles near the {place}.

**Temperatures:** Will feel {adjective} before lunch, then become {adjective} by evening.

**Chance of precipitation:** {number} percent chance of {plural noun} falling on anyone who forgot to {verb}.

**Weekend outlook:** Mostly {adjective} with isolated {plural noun} and one heroic {animal} saving a {object} from a tree.
